# iproute_macsec (Resource)

Manages a MACsec device (ip macsec).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Basic MACsec device
resource "iproute_macsec" "basic" {
  parent  = "eth0"
  name    = "macsec0"
  encrypt = true
}

# MACsec with port
resource "iproute_macsec" "with_port" {
  parent  = "eth0"
  name    = "macsec1"
  encrypt = true
  port    = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) MACsec interface name.
- `parent` (String) Parent interface.

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (String) Cipher suite.
- `encoding_sa` (Number) Encoding SA.
- `encrypt` (Boolean) Enable encryption.
- `icv_len` (Number) ICV length.
- `port` (Number) Port number.
- `protect` (Boolean) Enable protection.
- `replay_protect` (Boolean) Enable replay protection.
- `sci` (String) SCI value.
- `validate` (String) Validate mode.
- `window` (Number) Replay window size.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
